items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate a specific persona scenario involving accidental data posting. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete results or outcomes from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected result of a clear, actionable failure report was achieved. Without this critical information, it is impossible to determine if the scenario behavior is supported or if there is a failure, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
